class.name: GDKPresence
class.description: Manages Xbox rich presence for local and remote users. Set presence with [method set_presence_async], query remote users with [method get_presence_async] or [method get_presence_for_social_group_async], track presence changes with [method track_presence], and access cached records with [method get_cached_presence].

method.name: set_presence_async
method.description: Sets the presence state for the given local user. Await the returned completion [Signal] directly; the emitted [GDKResult] data contains the translated presence write payload.

method.name: clear_presence_async
method.description: Clears the presence state for the given local user. Await the returned completion [Signal] directly.

method.name: get_presence_async
method.description: Queries the presence of the specified users by XUID. Await the returned completion [Signal] directly. Results are cached and accessible via [method get_cached_presence].

method.name: get_presence_for_social_group_async
method.description: Queries presence records for a named social group using [param user] as the local Xbox Services context.

method.name: track_presence
method.description: Starts tracking device and title presence changes for the specified XUIDs. Optional title IDs opt into title-presence callbacks for additional titles.

method.name: stop_tracking_presence
method.description: Stops tracking the specified XUIDs and title IDs. Passing empty arrays stops all presence tracking owned by this service for [param user].

method.name: get_cached_presence
method.description: Returns the cached [GDKPresenceRecord] for the given XUID, or [code]null[/code] if not cached.

signal.name: presence_changed
signal.description: Emitted when a tracked user's presence changes.

signal.name: local_presence_set
signal.description: Emitted when a local user's presence has been successfully set.

signal.name: device_presence_changed
signal.description: Emitted when Xbox Services reports a tracked device-presence change.

signal.name: title_presence_changed
signal.description: Emitted when Xbox Services reports a tracked title-presence change.
